title: Speeches and Questions | Anna Dixon MP
meta_description: Read the latest speeches and parliamentary questions from Anna Dixon MP, addressing key issues such as NHS reform, Social Care, the economy, and local Shipley concerns. Stay updated on her contributions in Parliament and her efforts to advocate for her constituents.
headings: h2: Shipley MP continues campaign for electoral reform
h2: Anna Dixon MP champions Bradford’s young construction talent in Parliament following Airedale Hospital visit
h2: Shipley MP Demands Action to Clean Up Local Rivers and Protect Billpayers
h2: Local MP Calls for Tougher Action on Dangerous Driving as She Shares Personal Family Tragedy
text_excerpt: --> Speeches and Questions | Anna Dixon MP top of page ​Anna Dixon MP Home About Me Contact Surgeries and Advice Neighbourhood Survey Anna's Visits My Priorities Latest News Speeches and Questions Email Sign Up Privacy Policy Acceptable Behaviour Policy More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Speeches and Questions Shipley MP continues campaign for electoral reform Shipley MP Anna Dixon has today continued her long-standing campaign for reform of the UKs electoral system, sighting the strong public support for proportional representation in Parliament. Feb 23 Anna Dixon MP champions Bradford’s young construction talent in Parliament following Airedale Hospital visit Shipley MP Anna Dixon has today highlighted the achievements of Bradford’s young people and the importance of vocational education in the House of Commons during Prime Minister’s Questions. Feb 11 Shipley MP Demands Action to Clean Up Local Rivers and Protect Billpayers Shipley MP Anna Dixon has today continued her campaign for urgent reform of the water industry, citing in Parliament “years” of pollution, under‑investment and rising bills that have hit her constituents. Feb 10 Local MP Calls for Tougher Action on Dangerous Driving as She Shares Personal Family Tragedy Shipley MP Anna Dixon has today urged the Government to take bold action to tackle dangerous driving, drawing on her own family’s experience of losing a loved one in a fatal road collision.
